svg.title: DYAD Flux RPC DTL data transfer sequence
svg.desc: Shows the Flux RPC backend sequence: consumer packs upath into JSON, sends Flux streaming RPC, producer reads file and responds with raw bytes via flux_respond_raw, consumer reads via flux_rpc_get_raw, ENODATA signals end of stream.
svg.text: Data travels entirely through the Flux broker message bus.
No RDMA — msg pointer stored in DTL handle routes responses back to consumer.
